## Meeting Purpose

[Review sales pipeline and processes, including creating SOWs and following up with prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Created and sent SOW for Hyper Mode deal ($15k/month, Feb 17 kickoff)](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Reviewed several active deals (Rapid, Koala, Normal Security) and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Discussed importance of personalizing outreach and leveraging relationships](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Identified need to clean up and update CRM data for accurate pipeline tracking](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)

## Topics

### SOW Creation Process

  - [Used PandaDoc to create SOW from template](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Filled in client details, work streams, and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Customized email template to send SOW and follow-up notes](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Added prospects to relevant Slack channels for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)

### Pipeline Review

  - [Hyper Mode: Sent $15k/month proposal, aiming for Feb 17 kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Rapid: High intent, following up on contract, CMO approval pending](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=3313.0)
  - [Koala: Likely moving to March kickoff, updating timeline](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=3455.0)

  - [Several other deals (API Deck, Temporal) in various stages needing follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=3637.0)

### Outreach Strategies

  - [Leverage personal connections and past interactions (e.g., workshop attendees)](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Use vulnerability and shared experiences to build rapport](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=2128.0)
  - [Personalize LinkedIn profiles to tell authentic stories and connect with prospects](https://fathom.video/share/gYYDmvU2_rBrPozWJKM_W5zmoU-U6s6i?tab=summary&timestamp=2129.0)
